# Feature: MVE Render Layer 0.2 (Adapter + Jobs/Takes)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-06-14 -->

## Intent

Modulare Render-Schicht: `VoiceEngineAdapter` + Registry, Kokoro/Dummy-Adapter, SQLite für AudioJobs/Takes — Entkopplung von hardcoded Kokoro in Preview und Vorbereitung für Render Line (#22).

Roadmap: MVE Epic — MVP 0.2 (#17–#21).

## Happy Path

- [ ] Zod-Schemas für AudioJob, Take, RenderLineInput/Output exportiert und getestet
- [ ] `resolveAdapter(profile.engine)` liefert Kokoro- oder Dummy-Adapter
- [ ] Voice-Preview nutzt KokoroAdapter (kein direkter `synthesizeLocal` aus Hook)
- [ ] DummyAdapter erzeugt gültiges WAV ohne Sidecar
- [ ] SQLite CRUD für `mve_audio_jobs` + `mve_takes` lokal
- [ ] `mve-render-adapter` nutzt `dispatchByRuntime`

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Unbekannte Engine → strukturierter Fehler
- [ ] Schema v5 Migration idempotent auf bestehenden Projekten
- [ ] Adapter schreibt keine DB (nur Render-Service später)

## Regression

- [ ] Charakter-Voice-Preview (#6) weiter abspielbar
- [ ] Enhance Script (#7) unverändert
- [ ] MVE Lines/VoiceProfiles (#4) unverändert

## Assumptions

- Render Line Service (#22) und Take-UI (#23) folgen in separatem Slice
- Cloud-Render deferred (localNotSupported)

## Implementation Notes

- Phase 1: `apply-enhance-script.test.ts`, Enhance empty-text hint in `MveEnhanceScriptPanel`
- Phase 2: `schema/audio-job.ts`, `take.ts`, `render-line.ts`; `adapters/voice-engine-adapter.ts`, `registry.ts`
- Phase 3: `kokoro.adapter.ts`, `dummy.adapter.ts`; Preview via `resolveVoiceEngineAdapter` in `play-voice-preview.ts`
- SQLite v5: `mve_audio_jobs`, `mve_takes`; `LocalMveAudioJobRepository`, `LocalMveTakeRepository`, `mve-render-adapter.ts`
- Tests: render-schema, registry, dummy adapter, apply-enhance-script (21 MVE tests green)
- Deferred: Take-UI (#23) — Service + Hook in #22 done
